name: [BUG-TXN-001] TC-TXN-001 — Transaction list: negative page (-1) must return 400
description:
**[BUG-TXN-001]**

Passing `page=-1` to the transaction list endpoint should return 400 Bad Request. A negative page index is not meaningful and indicates a client error.

**Expected:** HTTP 400 with `"message":"page must be >= 0"`

**Impact:** If the server treats page=-1 as page=0 (common ORM behaviour), results are silently incorrect with no indication to the client. If it errors at the DB layer, it produces a confusing 500.
descriptionHtml:
[BUG-TXN-001]

Passing page=-1 to the transaction list endpoint should return 400 Bad Request. A negative page index is not meaningful and indicates a client error.

Expected: HTTP 400 with "message":"page must be >= 0"

Impact: If the server treats page=-1 as page=0 (common ORM behaviour), results are silently incorrect with no indication to the client. If it errors at the DB layer, it produces a confusing 500.
statusMessage:
Error: [BUG-TXN-001] page=-1 must return 400, got 502

expect(received).toContain(expected) // indexOf

Expected value: 502
Received array: [400, 422]
